name: My Worker Name
description: One sentence describing what this worker does for its user.
capabilitySummary: Short paragraph (2-3 sentences) describing the worker's capabilities. Used in the marketplace and in Alex's briefings.

canvasTabs.label: Overview
canvasTabs.description: Main view — what Alex shows when the user opens this worker.

_notes.slug: Must be globally unique across all SOCIII workers. Lowercase, hyphens only. Cannot be changed after publish.
_notes.id: Prefix with your creator initials. e.g. RUTH-001, KENT-001.
_notes.canvasTabs.signal: Use a guaranteed signal from sdk/spec.json or define a custom one in your PR.
_notes.status: Start at 'waitlist' while building. Flip to 'live' when ready to publish.
_notes.valueBucket: Pick from: make_money, save_money, save_time, stay_organized, stay_compliant, delight_customers
